examples: She speaks her lines very woodenly.
She woodenly attempted to explain her mistake, but it was just adding insult to injury.
Hansen wiped the heavy dust out of sofa hastily, stuck in sofa woodenly, as in fog; he tried to tide up main threads of the affair.
Cut to a video of an IBM dude woodenly reading from a teleprompter (his eyes dart quickly left-to-right) about the cell processor system.
